theme: Why your awards ceremony is forgettable (and how to fix it)

linkedin.text:
Recognition is the most powerful retention tool you own — and most companies waste it on a rubber-chicken dinner.

Why your annual awards night is forgettable:
❌ Same hotel ballroom every year
❌ PowerPoint slides with clip-art trophies
❌ A 45-minute speech nobody remembers
❌ Winners announced in order of importance (everyone leaves after #1)

What actually works:
✅ An unexpected venue — rooftop, museum, vineyard, yacht
✅ Cinematic production: lighting, sound, LED screens
✅ A short, personal video tribute for each winner
✅ Reverse order — announce #1 last and keep the room hooked
✅ A meal that's an experience, not an afterthought

Across 200+ events since 2010, the unforgettable nights all share these moves.

📅 Comment 'GUIDE' for our awards-night production checklist.

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #EmployeeEngagement #B2BEvents #MICE #Leadership #EmployeeRecognition

instagram.text:
Your awards ceremony is forgettable — and it's costing you your best people. 👇

❌ Same hotel ballroom
❌ Clip-art trophies
❌ 45-minute speech
❌ Winners in order (everyone leaves after #1)

What works instead:
✅ Unexpected venue (rooftop, museum, yacht)
✅ Cinematic production (lights, sound, LED)
✅ A video tribute for each winner
✅ Announce #1 LAST — keep everyone hooked
✅ A meal that IS the experience

Recognition is your #1 retention tool. Don't waste it. 💛

Save this and tag the HR lead planning this year's gala.

📩 Link in bio.

facebook.text:
Be honest: can anyone on your team remember last year's awards ceremony? 🤔

Same hotel. Same PowerPoint. Same speech. That's the problem.

Now picture this instead:
✅ Rooftop venue with city lights
✅ Cinematic production — real lighting, LED screens
✅ A personal video tribute for each winner
✅ A meal that's an experience, not an afterthought

Recognition is your most powerful retention tool. Don't waste it on a forgettable evening.

What's the best award you've ever received at work? Tell us in the comments. 💬
